{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Spellbinder
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Spellbinder]] is the name [[Varic Vallenar]] used in another [[life]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Spellbinder]] was a legendary criminal throughout the galaxy.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c49">''The Engineer'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“In another life, I called myself Spellbinder,” I said.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
